lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've brought you a clean bedsheet, Robin.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Well it's about time. Run along now, I need some Robin time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's nice to see another human face around here.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Leave me be, peasant - I am relaxing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's nice!

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Do you know who I am?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I haven't had the privilege.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: I, peasant, am Robin, Master Bowman. I am very famous you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, Robin, Master Bowman, I see.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: So have you heard of me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Would you do me a favour? I appear to have run out of bed linen. Can you run along to the innkeeper and get me a clean bedsheet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything for a famous person such as yourself.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Now that sounds more like it. Run along now, get me my sheet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go and get it yourself.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Oh charming. You just can't get the staff these days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, still here then?

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Do you want another game of Runedraw?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Sorry, my orders are that I can only give slime to those who have completed the Morytania medium, hard or elite diaries.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: There's a diary master in Canifis, go and speak to her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have these bones converted into bonemeal with the promised amount of slime, please?

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: You do not have enough space for both bonemeal and slime. Come back to me when you have space.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: You do not have any bones for me to convert for you.

sections.title: If the player does have the toxic blowpipe equipped

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: As THE Master Bowman, I am quite impressed by your equipment, but it's not the sort I'd recommend myself. Try more conventional forms of accuracy enhancement.

sections.title: If the player does not have the toxic blowpipe equipped

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Robin
lines.text: As THE Master Bowman, I am most impressed by your equipment, peasant.
